Name: Glaze by Raycast
Tagline: Create your own Mac apps by chatting with AI
Description: Glaze is the easiest way to go from an idea to a Mac app. Describe what you want, and it builds a real app that lives in your dock, launches instantly, works offline, and taps into the full power of your computer. Software that's finally personal, shaped around you. From the makers of Raycast.

Name: Goals from Loops
Tagline: Measure whether a campaign drove the desired outcome
Description: Goals from Loops lets SaaS teams measure whether a campaign actually drove the outcome they care about. Pick a conversion target, choose who should be measured, set an attribution window, and see conversions, enrollments, and impressions right inside Loops.

Name: Tamamon
Tagline: A desktop pet that grows as you code with Claude Code
Description: Tamamon is a macOS desktop pet that lives on top of your screen and grows the more you build with Claude Code. What it does: - 20 species to collect through a weekly gacha, each with its own evolved forms and quirks - Feed it, play (ball, bubbles), and decorate its habitat - Reacts to real time and weather — when it rains or night falls, your pet heads home to rest - Nothing leaves your Mac. No account, no sign-in, no tracking, nothing uploaded.

Name: Osloq
Tagline: An AI agent that reproduces GitHub issues for you
Description: Most AI dev tools just read your code and guess. Osloq actually runs it. Connect your GitHub, pick an issue, and an AI agent spins up a real sandbox, clones your repo, runs it, and tries to reproduce the bug the way a developer would. You get a report backed by real evidence. What happened, the steps it took, and whether the bug is real, not a hallucinated guess. No local setup, no "works on my machine." It handles the tedious reproduction step so you jump straight to fixing.

Name: Vox
Tagline: Talk to GitHub Copilot out loud
Topics: Open Source, Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub
Description: Vox is a GitHub Copilot CLI extension: run /vox and a reactive listening orb opens in its own window. Speak your turn, hear the agent reply. Voice in, voice out — on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

Name: Archify
Tagline: understand software
Description: See components, APIs, libraries, understand application behavior directly inside your browser.

Name: nxt
Tagline: Talk to your to do list and get what's next
Description: nxt is the AI task manager you talk to like a human assistant. Brain-dump your thoughts in plain language - nxt reads between the lines, extracts tasks, infers priorities, and files everything automatically. It understands what you mean, not just what you say. nxt learns your personal context, so your tasks flex around your life. When you're ready to act, nxt cuts through the noise and gives you one clear task, one reason why. No scrolling, no paralysis, no overwhelming list to wade through.

Name: Notta Desktop - Privacy Mode
Tagline: Offline AI meeting notes with unlimited transcription
Description: Record and transcribe private meetings locally with Notta Desktop. Privacy Mode keeps audio, transcripts, and meeting notes on your computer, with offline transcription and no cloud processing. Try it free for 7 days. No credit card required.

Name: Pixel Machha
Tagline: Photos from Camera to your Guests in lightening speed !
Topics: Photography, Live Events, Social media marketing
Description: Pixel Machha gives event photographers and social media a professional platform — FTP camera uploads, AI face recognition, branded guest albums, Social Media specific editing and exporting, and live slideshows. All in one place.

Name: Aura Matter
Tagline: Create jewelry with AI, explore it in 3D, then make it real
Description: Aura Matter turns a spark of imagination into jewelry you can actually wear. Describe an idea, mood, or story, and our AI generates original jewelry concepts for you to explore in interactive 3D. Refine the details, choose your material, and order a physical piece made just for you. Most AI design tools stop at a beautiful image. Aura Matter connects AI creation to real production, turning digital ideas into tangible, made-to-order jewelry.

Name: OneShots
Tagline: OneShots - 10s create amazing APP screenshots
Topics: Design Tools, User Experience, Developer Tools
Description: OneShots is the fastest way to turn your app screenshots into store-ready marketing visuals. Upload raw screenshots, pick a template, customize text and branding — then export all device sizes and all languages in 10 seconds. Why you'll love it: ⚡ 10 seconds, not "in minutes" 🎯 One edit, everywhere 📱 Built for app stores 🌍 Multi-language ready 📦 Bulk HD export 🎨 Templates that convert No Figma. No freelancers. No manual resizing. 👉 Try OneShots free today — https://oneshots.cc

Name: JoJo Days
Tagline: The baby book you'll actually keep
Description: JoJo Days is a private, playful baby journal and digital memory book. Start during pregnancy with a due-date countdown, then keep every note, photo, and video - from the bump to the grown-up years.

Name: Time Left
Tagline: Track your life in weeks and meaningful moments
Description: Time Left is an iOS life calendar that turns your remaining weeks into a simple visual timeline. Add past and future moments, personalize Home Screen and Lock Screen widgets, and keep your personal data stored locally.

Name: Alvoff Inference - Fast, cheap STT · TTS
Tagline: AI inference based out of India
Description: Alvoff Inference provides cheap and reliable API for speech-to-text, text-to-speech based out of India. We aim to be the one stop solution for voice related inference. Our infrastructure is purpose-built for audio workloads, which means low latency and lower cost compared to general-purpose cloud providers. You can signup on the platform and get $5 of inference for free.

Name: tasktrack
Tagline: just type what you did. look back anytime.
Description: A minimal work log for people who forget what they did last Tuesday. No projects, no boards, no dropdowns — just a text box. Type what you did, hit enter, done. Scroll back whenever you need to remember, write a status update, or fill out that performance review you've been avoiding.

Name: Formo. Forms built by AI.
Tagline: Unlimited forms. Unlimited responses. Just chat.
Description: 1. Unlimited forms. Unlimited responses. Forever free. 2. Describe your form in plain English. AI builds the questions, logic, and calculations. 3. Beautiful forms without drag & drop or endless settings. Just chat.

Name: OpenWiki
Tagline: Writes and updates automatically documentation for AI agent
Description: OpenWiki is a CLI that writes and maintains agent documentation for your codebase. Resources

Name: RapidCart
Tagline: Create an online storefront for your business in minutes
Description: Create an affordable online storefront for your products, add and edit products in a simple built-in editor, share your store anywhere, accept online payments, and manage orders in minutes. Built for India's small sellers.

Name: SyncBooster
Tagline: Create and publish social media posts via AI chat
Topics: Social Media, Artificial Intelligence, Marketing automation
Description: SyncBooster is an AI chat that creates and publishes social media posts for small service businesses. Send a photo and a short note, get a ready post with copy, hashtags and CTA tailored to your brand - then confirm in chat to publish across Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn and Google Business at once. Includes an AI image studio, asset gallery, and post history. No dashboards, no complicated forms - just a conversation.

Name: valv
Tagline: Give AI agents safe, scoped access to your database
Topics: Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub, Data & Analytics
Description: Most agents get one god-mode DB connection, valv gives every user their own. A customer asks your support agent "where's my order?" With a raw connection, that query could read every other customer's rows too. With valv, you set programmatic per-user permissions once, every query is validated and scoped to the caller, and no raw SQL ever hits your DB. Ships as an MCP server or a TypeScript library.
